children.text: attempts to do bodily harm to another person;
offers to do bodily harm to another person; or
does bodily harm to another person;
who, with the intent to do bodily harm, offers to do bodily harm with a dangerous weapon;
who, in committing an assault, inflicts substantial bodily harm or grievous bodily harm on another person; or
who commits an assault by strangulation or suffocation;

children.heading: Assault With Intent to Commit Specified Offenses.—
children.label: c Assault With Intent to Commit Specified Offenses.—

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Any person subject to this chapter who commits assault with intent to commit an offense specified in paragraph (2) shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.

children.heading: .—Offenses specified
children.label: 2 .—Offenses specified
children.text: The offenses referred to in paragraph (1) are murder, voluntary manslaughter, rape, sexual assault, rape of a child, sexual assault of a child, robbery, arson, burglary, and kidnapping.
